children.heading: Group health plan
children.label: 1 Group health plan
children.text: The term “group health plan” means an employee welfare benefit plan providing medical care (as defined in ) to participants or beneficiaries directly or through insurance, reimbursement, or otherwise. Such term shall not include any plan substantially all of the coverage under which is for qualified long-term care services (as defined in ). Such term shall not include any qualified small employer health reimbursement arrangement (as defined in ).section 213(d) of title 26section 7702B(c) of title 26section 9831(d)(2) of title 26

children.heading: Covered employee
children.label: 2 Covered employee
children.text: The term “covered employee” means an individual who is (or was) provided coverage under a group health plan by virtue of the performance of services by the individual for 1 or more persons maintaining the plan (including as an employee defined in ).section 401(c)(1) of title 26

children.label: i
children.text: as the spouse of the covered employee, or

children.label: ii
children.text: as the dependent child of the employee.

children.heading: Special rule for terminations and reduced employment
children.label: B Special rule for terminations and reduced employment
children.text: In the case of a qualifying event described in , the term “qualified beneficiary” includes the covered employee.section 1163(2) of this title

children.heading: Special rule for retirees and widows
children.label: C Special rule for retirees and widows
i
children.text: as the spouse of the covered employee,

children.label: ii
children.text: as the dependent child of the employee, or

children.label: iii
children.text: as the surviving spouse of the covered employee.

children.heading: Employer
children.label: 4 Employer
children.text: Subsection (n) (relating to leased employees) and subsection (t) (relating to application of controlled group rules to certain employee benefits) of shall apply for purposes of this part in the same manner and to the same extent as such subsections apply for purposes of . Any regulations prescribed by the Secretary pursuant to the preceding sentence shall be consistent and coextensive with any regulations prescribed for similar purposes by the Secretary of the Treasury (or such Secretary’s delegate) under such subsections.section 414 of title 26section 106 of title 26

children.label: A
children.text: that the period of extended coverage referred to in commences with the date of the loss of coverage, andsection 1162(2) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: that the applicable notice period provided under commences with the date of the loss of coverage.section 1166(a)(2) of this title
